description.content: This allows a client (a gateway for example) to notify APIclarity about newly discovered APIs. If one of the APIs already exists, it is ignored.

description.content:
APIClarity is an open source API security and observability tool that analyzes API traffic to reconstruct OpenAPI specifications, detect shadow and zombie APIs, identify API differences and changes, and provide API security alerts. This is the REST API exposed by an APIClarity deployment.

Contact Support:
 Name: OpenClarity
